description: Opening of a letter in Hebrew to a group of important people, with wide space between the lines. The beginning of the body of the letter in Judaeo-Arabic is also preserved and says, "When we sent to you [copious praises . . . ben] Sasson ha-Dayyan."
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
